sections.paragraph:
Original: פּלתי

Transliteration: pelêthı̂y

Phonetic: pel-ay-thee'

BDB Definition:

Pelethites = "couriers"
  1. a collective name for the guardsmen of David
    1. probably descendants of an unknown person, perhaps Philistine mercenaries

Origin: from the same form as H6431

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
